languages.text: "Ну и зрелище, да. Отростки Погонщицы вашу машину с неба смахнули. Эта тварина уже вторую неделю как тут окопалась, мы даже..." {n}Боец осекается, видимо осознав, что заговорился.{/n} "Это все без разницы, пока мы не узнаем кто вы такие".

traits.locale_text: "Ну и зрелище, да. Отростки Погонщицы вашу машину с неба смахнули. Эта тварина уже вторую неделю как тут окопалась, мы даже..." {n}Боец осекается, видимо осознав, что заговорился.{/n} "Это все без разницы, пока мы не узнаем кто вы такие".
traits.speaker: JanurZarkovSergeant

languages.text: "Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."
languages.original_text: "Ну и зрелище, да. Отростки Погонщицы вашу машину с неба смахнули. Эта тварина уже вторую неделю как тут окопалась, мы даже..." {n}Боец осекается, видимо осознав, что заговорился.{/n} "Это все без разницы, пока мы не узнаем кто вы такие".

traits.locale_text: "Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's growths snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even..." {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly realizing he hass said too much.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

"Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

"Oh, I know what it was. The Drover's growths. That thing's been besieging us for two weeks now — we set one toe out of camp and it's right on us. It'll spit poison or bash us in the head with a spike. Charming thing, isn't it?"

"Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's growths snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even..." {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly realizing he hass said too much.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

"Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

"Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

languages.text: 「ああ、わかった。ドローバーの成長よ。あの化け物は2週間も私たちを襲っている。キャンプから一歩出れば、すぐそこにいるのよ。毒を吐いたり、尖ったものを使って頭部を叩いたりする。魅力的な化け物よね？」
languages.original_text: "Oh, I know what it was. The Drover's growths. That thing's been besieging us for two weeks now — we set one toe out of camp and it's right on us. It'll spit poison or bash us in the head with a spike. Charming thing, isn't it?"

languages.text: "Ne gösteriydi ama, değil mi? Çoban'ın dokunaçları makinemizi tam gökte yakaladı. Kahrolası şey, iki haftadır bizi kuşatıyor. Biz bile..." {n}Asker, sanki söylememesi gereken bir şeyi belirtmeden önce kendini susturuyor.{/n} "Önemli değil. Kim olduğunuzu öğrenene kadar yani."
languages.original_text: "Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

traits.locale_text: "Ne gösteriydi ama, değil mi? Çoban'ın dokunaçları makinemizi tam gökte yakaladı. Kahrolası şey, iki haftadır bizi kuşatıyor. Biz bile..." {n}Asker, sanki söylememesi gereken bir şeyi belirtmeden önce kendini susturuyor.{/n} "Önemli değil. Kim olduğunuzu öğrenene kadar yani."

languages.text: “刚才那一下挺壮观吧？拒生花的触手直接从天上把你的飞行器拽了下来。那该死的怪物围困我们两个星期了，我们甚至还——”{n}那名士兵突然住了口，似乎差点说出不该说的话。{/n}“算了。在弄清你的身份之前，不能多说。”
languages.original_text: "Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

traits.locale_text: “刚才那一下挺壮观吧？拒生花的触手直接从天上把你的飞行器拽了下来。那该死的怪物围困我们两个星期了，我们甚至还——”{n}那名士兵突然住了口，似乎差点说出不该说的话。{/n}“算了。在弄清你的身份之前，不能多说。”

languages.text: "Ein ziemliches Spektakel, was? Die Tentakel des Treibers haben Eure Maschine einfach vom Himmel gepflückt. Das verdammte Dieng belagert uns nun schon seit zwei Wochen. Wir haben sogar ..." {n}Der Soldat unterbricht sich, ehe er etwas sagt, das er nicht sagen sollte.{/n} "Das spielt keine Rolle. Jedenfalls bis wir wissen, wer Ihr seid."
languages.original_text: "Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

traits.locale_text: "Ein ziemliches Spektakel, was? Die Tentakel des Treibers haben Eure Maschine einfach vom Himmel gepflückt. Das verdammte Dieng belagert uns nun schon seit zwei Wochen. Wir haben sogar ..." {n}Der Soldat unterbricht sich, ehe er etwas sagt, das er nicht sagen sollte.{/n} "Das spielt keine Rolle. Jedenfalls bis wir wissen, wer Ihr seid."

languages.text: « Sacré spectacle, pas vrai ? Les vrilles du Chasseur ont fauché votre engin en plein vol. Cette saleté nous assiège depuis deux semaines, nous avons même... » {n}Le soldat s'interrompt, visiblement sur le point de divulguer une information confidentielle.{/n} « Mais les explications attendront que vous vous soyez {mf|présenté|présentée}. »
languages.original_text: "Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."

traits.locale_text: « Sacré spectacle, pas vrai ? Les vrilles du Chasseur ont fauché votre engin en plein vol. Cette saleté nous assiège depuis deux semaines, nous avons même... » {n}Le soldat s'interrompt, visiblement sur le point de divulguer une information confidentielle.{/n} « Mais les explications attendront que vous vous soyez {mf|présenté|présentée}. »

languages.text: «Todo un espectáculo, ¿verdad? Los zarcillos del Pastor han atrapado su nave en el cielo. Esa maldita cosa lleva dos semanas asediándonos, ya hasta...». {n}El soldado se interrumpe, como si se detuviera antes de decir algo que no debiera.{/n} «No importa. No hasta que sepamos quién es usted».
languages.original_text: "Quite a show, wasn't it? The Drover's tendrils snatched your machine right out of the sky. The damn thing's been besieging us for two weeks now, we even—" {n}The soldier cuts himself off, seemingly before he says something he should not.{/n} "Doesn't matter. Not until we know who you are."
